all_findings.description: Bounchanh: rank contradiction — Bounchanh is referred to as Captain in scene 16 and Major in scenes 37 and 46. This is a rank change without narrative explanation of promotion.
evidence: Scene 16: "Bounchanh picked up the radio handset." — Captain (implied by command authority)
Scene 37: "Major Bounchanh is in the field" — Major
all_findings.suggested_fix: Reconcile rank for Bounchanh across scenes 16 and 37

all_findings.description: Khamla: rank contradiction — Khamla is identified as a private in scene 14 and as a Lieutenant in scene 47. This is a significant rank change without narrative explanation.
evidence: Scene 14: "Khamla had been with the unit since the dry season. He had been a good soldier" — private
Scene 47: "There were three of them in the field position — Lieutenant Khamla, Sergeant Phomma" — Lieutenant
all_findings.suggested_fix: Reconcile rank for Khamla across scenes 14 and 47

all_findings.description: Coyle: leg_injury_location contradiction — Scene 15 states the left femur is fractured, but scene 90 indicates the right leg/femur is the injured one. These are contradictory statements about which leg is injured.
evidence: Scene 15: "The left femur was the problem. Not the burns — the burns down his right side were a condition" — left femur fractured
Scene 90: "Coyle's right leg was wrong and had been wrong since before Archer found him" — right leg wrong, femur gone somewhere it wasn't supposed to be
all_findings.suggested_fix: Reconcile leg_injury_location for Coyle across scenes 15 and 90

all_findings.description: Coyle: right_leg_fracture_location contradiction — Scene 10 indicates a bone broken below the knee (in the right leg based on context), but scene 15 specifies the left femur as the problem. These contradict regarding which leg is fractured.
evidence: Scene 10: "the movement produced a grinding sensation below the knee that told him the bone was broken" — bone broken below knee
Scene 15: "The left femur was the problem. Not the burns — the burns down his right side were a condition" — left femur fractured
all_findings.suggested_fix: Reconcile right_leg_fracture_location for Coyle across scenes 10 and 15
